_doc: Canonical model-tier map (overhaul task 10, adaptive model). Per agent, per capability tier. Deterministic resolver: scripts/resolve_model.mjs. CONSUMED (not a dead knob): the opencode projector generates opencode.json `model` from agents.opencode.high and `small_model` from agents.opencode.small (test-projection.mjs enforces byte-parity). For Claude Code this map is ADVISORY for SUB-AGENT routing only (CC cannot switch model mid-session): run the main loop on `high`, delegate mechanical/verify work to `mid`/`small` sub-agents to cut token cost. Codex switches models via external tooling (cc-switch/provider config) — out of scope here. NEVER auto-configure provider switching for Claude Code (account-ban risk).
